name: Rosemary Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut two pieces of parchment paper, 12 inches square each. Fold them in half and crease firmly.
2. Trim each piece into a heart shape. Lightly coat one side of each parchment with cooking spray.
3. Place a chicken breast half on one half of the parchment heart near the crease. Sprinkle with salt.
4. Arrange half of the peas, bell pepper, and rosemary over the chicken. Drizzle with half of the lemon juice.
5. Fold the remaining half of the parchment heart over the chicken. Starting at the rounded edge of the heart, pleat and crimp the edges together to seal.
6. Twist the end tightly to seal. Repeat for the second piece.
7. Place the sealed bags on a microwave-safe dish. Microwave at high power for 5-6 minutes.
8. Cut open the tops of the parchment and discard the rosemary sprigs. Garnish with fresh rosemary sprigs if desired.
